Why Laser Treatment

The Smarter Way to Clear Nail Fungus

All treatment is done personally by DR. INDIRA KHURANA Ph.D., I.M.D. — who has successfully treated thousands of nail fungus cases over 20+ years of laser experience.

💫

Painless & Drug-Free

Clients experience only a mild warming or tingling sensation during the 15–20 minute session. No anaesthesia required. No medication needed — before, during, or after.

🎯

Targeted & Non-Invasive

Laser specifically targets fungal cells within the nail plate and nail bed using selective photothermolysis — destroying only the fungus while leaving surrounding healthy skin and tissue completely untouched.

⚡

No Downtime

Clients can immediately resume normal activities, wear shoes, and even exercise right after a session. Walk in — walk out — carry on with your day.

🛡️

Zero Side Effects

Unlike oral medications such as terbinafine or itraconazole, laser therapy carries no risk of liver toxicity, kidney damage, or gastrointestinal issues — making it safe for clients with complex medical histories.

✅

Superior to Topicals

Topical creams cannot penetrate the thick nail plate. Laser passes through easily to reach the underlying infection — eliminating the need for a year-long daily cream regimen or oral pill compliance challenges.

🏥

Safe for High-Risk Groups

The preferred treatment for elderly clients, individuals with diabetes, and pregnant women who cannot safely take oral antifungal medications. Safe, gentle, and effective.

📋
How Many Sessions Will I Need?

The number of sessions depends on the severity of your individual case — and can only be determined after a physical examination during your initial free consultation.

Privacy Policy

Last updated: April 2025
Laser Cosmetics Clinic ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your personal information.

Information We Collect

When you submit our consultation form, we collect your name, email address, phone number, and preferred clinic location. This information is used solely to contact you about your free consultation booking.

How We Use Your Information

We use your information to: (1) contact you to confirm your free consultation appointment; (2) send you relevant information about our nail fungus laser treatment services; (3) process your $50 discount voucher. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.

Cookies & Tracking

This page may use cookies and tracking pixels (Google, Facebook) to measure the effectiveness of our advertising. You can disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

Contact Us

For any privacy concerns, please call us at +1 289 401 8028 or visit us at 3050 Artesian Dr., Unit #4, Mississauga, ON or 700 Balmoral Dr., Unit #7, Brampton, ON.

Terms & Conditions

$50 OFF Offer

The $50 discount applies to your first paid laser nail fungus treatment session at Laser Cosmetics Clinic. This offer is valid for new clients only, cannot be combined with other offers, and is subject to availability. Offer may be withdrawn at any time.

Free Consultation

Free consultations are available at both our Mississauga and Brampton locations. By submitting the form, you consent to being contacted by our clinic team by phone to schedule your appointment. There is no obligation to proceed with treatment.

Results

Individual results may vary. The number of treatments required depends on the severity of the infection and individual client factors. Results shown are representative examples and are not guaranteed.
